feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,283Chapters: 66/?Kudos: 34

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: 500 Miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,413Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back. Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t. The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word *traitor.* A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: When Magic meets the modern day, chaos ensues
entry.summary:
Author: Music_girl2024

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,469Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Merlin shouldn’t have turned himself into a tree…1500 years ago it seemed like a smart idea - wait out the years until Arthur’s return as part of nature, without having to interact with anyone. He wasn’t expecting the lake to expand and for his tree to end up in the shallows. Nor was he expecting to be spat out randomly on what he assumed to be an ordinary sunset. Now he’s stuck in the middle of a lake, a recently resurrected Arthur Pendragon in his arms and someone is staring at them.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Blood, Sweat and Tears
entry.summary:
Author: Marshmellow0v0

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,010Chapters: 8/15Kudos: 76

Summary: Merlin disappears in the middle of the night, leaving behind nothing but a scream heard by a nearby servant, a smear of blood, and a castle full of unanswered questions. Arthur is convinced it’s just Merlin being Merlin, until the hours stretch on, the clues grow stranger, and the fear in Camelot becomes impossible to ignore. Arthur goes off on a journey to find the missing Merlin, to bring him home, back to Camelot. But that’s harder than Arthur could have ever imagined.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,855Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but sets in a motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy.

entry.title: Found a place so safe
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,080Chapters: 4/15Kudos: 6

Summary: It had been a week since Morgana returned to Camelot. A week of smiling at Uther. A week of playing the role of the perfect Lady the King had tried to mould her into. A week of reconnecting with Arthur after years of keeping him at arm’s length. She found that he was not the mirror of Uther she had once thought him to be. For the first time in a long while, she understood what Merlin saw in him. She had had her doubts, but now she was sure of it. Arthur could be a great King someday, but he needed all the help he could get, and one part of helping him was telling him the truth.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Bruise
entry.summary:
Author: hpalsowritessecretly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,280Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 14

Summary: Merlin trips and Arthur becomes fixated on the resulting bruise. Meanwhile, Merlin tries to distract Arthur from finding out about his magic with some convoluted 4D chess. This is 30% them bickering and 70% vague smut. They don’t explicitly have sex but they do jerk each other off a few times.

entry.title: Marriage & Mayhem
entry.summary:
Author: Can_I_hear_a_wahoo2

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,452Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin had only told Gwaine about the true nature of his and Arthur’s spontaneous trip. Then thinking that someone with some common sense should also know, Arthur confided in Leon who couldn’t say he was surprised in the slightest that they had gotten married. Not long later, Leon was fairly sure Gwaine had told all of the knights and castle staff. It was a wonder in itself that word hadn’t yet got back to Uther. So yes, the thought of an ignorant Uther playing matchmaker was quite a big problem. OR Merlin and Arthur end up getting married and actually don't mind being each others forever, but Uther doesn't know this and puts a spanner in the works.

entry.title: The Once and Future Wizard
entry.summary:
Author: QuinnieSparrow5

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,201Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Now in his sixth year at Hogwarts, grappling with the oncoming war and dealing with the maddening feeling in his gut, Merlin couldn't be blamed for not paying full attention to the nervous first years at the front of the Great Hall. Especially not when the feeling suddenly seemed to take over his entire body with its intensity. Merlin's clapped absently as a student was sorted into Hufflepuff, his house, when the next name made his head snap up. “Arthur Pendragon”

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,374Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear, and others are made which may destroy them both. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?

entry.title: eye in the sun/you're all I see
entry.summary:
Author: Mayverix

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,769Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: Merlin slept for a week after bringing Arthur back from Camlann. Arthur worried Merlin had somehow imparted his own life force into him, draining himself, but Gaius assured him it was most likely just the level of magic Merlin had used that had exhausted him.Accounts from the area certainly seemed to confirm that story. People had seen a god, or so they said. When Arthur lifted the magic ban, it passed almost without resistance. Whatever Merlin had done, whatever he’d been, people had seen the divine, and known it was magic itself.When magic itself woke, he told Arthur never to do that to him again, and called him a variety of names for good measure.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Wait for Me (I'm coming with you)
entry.summary:
Author: Lilbug2422

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 774Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin sets off to Ealdor using the excuse of visiting her mother, hiding the true reason behind her trip to herself. However when Arthur and the knights tag along (totally because they have business in that area of the kingdom and NOT because they're worried about Merlin traveling by herself) things get complicated. Merlin doesn't wish to tell them about the real reason she's going to Ealdor, shame of falling to societies expectations of her keeping her mouth sealed tightly. However when the truth gets revealed how will Arthur react to potentially losing his Merlin to those very same expectations? Will he break through his own societal pressures to keep her? Or simply watch her go?

entry.title: meadowsweet, sit with me
entry.summary:
Author: Violey_431

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,221Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Arthur's eyes caught onto a blue swatch of fabric, tied against a tree branch. He nudged Hengreon forward. It was Merlin's neckerchief. Stained with the earth, sweat, and... blood. "Sire?" Agravaine called. His voice was distorted by the faint ringing in his ears. "We're close." Arthur straightened, carefully folding the neckerchief, "This is Merlin's." Agravaine was beside him, now, "This piece of cloth? Sire, we can hardly-" He held up a hand, silencing his uncle, "It's his. I would know it anywhere." or An alternate take on Lamia, featuring: an injured Merlin, apologetic knights, and a furious Arthur Pendragon

entry.title: Half a Crown
entry.summary:
Author: decidedlynotheterosexual

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,787Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 48

Summary: The chamber ceiling recedes, opens before them. Arthur thinks he could go far as the starless night, be swallowed there, in the belly of a great and terrible serpent. He is no-one; he is nothing. He needs another half to complete him, and without it, he is worse than dead.Arthur hears of the Écrevisse, a cave that shows both a man’s greatest fear and deepest desire. To prove himself, he goes alone. Without Merlin. Yet the cave brings Merlin to him, as Arthur’s fears and desires become one.

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,278Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Hidden Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,314Chapters: 60/67Kudos: 248

Summary: Merthur receives a surprise neither of them expected, turning not only their lives upside down, but also those of everyone around them.Will they be able to find their happy ending, while hiding everything from King Uther with the help of their friends?****Stay tuned to find out and keep reading. It's going to be a multi-chapter story. The number of chapters is unknown yet, but more tags will surely be added soon. So stay tuned for updates.

entry.title: Dower the Stars by RurouniHime [Podfic]
entry.summary:
Author: Billyballz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3Chapters: 1/8Kudos: 1

Summary: During a time of great prosperity in Albion, the Druids offer Emrys a precious gift. Arthur is not amused. (aka, "The Great Conjunction is at Hand, Everyone Kiss Merlin!") Podfic of the amazing work by RurouniHime!

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,316Chapters: 15/55Kudos: 106

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
